ps.ptxt: Brake fluid leakage from brake lines
Brake disc or pads stained with fluid, grease or other oil
Poor contact of shoes on brake drum (rear drum brake model)
Brake shoe stained with oil or wet with water (rear drum brake model)
Badly worn brake pad and/or shoe
Defective wheel cylinders (rear drum brake model)
Negative pressure for brake booster is inadequate

action.ptxt: Check engine condition and vacuum hose.
Check system and replace if necessary.

condition.ptxt: Vehicle pulls to one side (Brakes not working uniformly)

ps.ptxt: Pad, disc, shoe and/or drum are wet with water or stained with oil in some brakes
Drum-to-shoe clearance out of adjustment in some brake (Malfunctioning auto adjusting mechanism) (rear drum brake model)

action.ptxt: Check for inoperative auto adjusting mechanism.

ps.ptxt: Disc and/or drum are out of round in some brakes
Malfunction in wheel cylinders (rear drum brake model)

action.ptxt: Tires with approximately the same amount of tread should be used on the same axle.

paragroup.ptxt: Check for soft hoses and damaged lines.
Replace with new hoses and new double-walled steel brake tubing.

action.ptxt: Check for stuck or sluggish pistons and proper lubrication of caliper slide pin.
Check and torque bolts to specifications.

condition.ptxt: Noise (High pitched squeak without brake applied)

ps.ptxt: Contact of wear indicator to brake disc
Worn rear brake shoe (rear drum brake model)

condition.ptxt: Excessive pedal travel (Pedal stroke too large)

action.ptxt: Check brake systems and repair if necessary.
Repair the leaking point, and bleed air.

ps.ptxt: Rear brake system not adjusted (malfunctioning auto adjusting mechanism)
Bent brake shoes (rear drum brake model)

condition.ptxt: Dragging brakes (A very light drag is present in all brakes immediately after pedal is released)

ps.ptxt: Master cylinder pistons not returning correctly

action.ptxt: Check for soft hoses or damaged pipes and replace with new hoses and/or new brake piping.

ps.ptxt: Incorrect parking brake adjustment on rear brakes

action.ptxt: Check and adjust to correct specifications.

ps.ptxt: Weakened or broken return springs in the brake
Sluggish parking brake cables or linkage
Wheel cylinder or caliper piston sticking
Badly worn piston seal in caliper

condition.ptxt: Pedal pulsation (Pedal pulsates when depressed for braking)

ps.ptxt: Distorted steering knuckle or rear wheel hub assembly

action.ptxt: Replace knuckle or rear wheel spindle or rear axle shaft.
Check per instructions. If not within specifications, replace or machine disc.

ps.ptxt: Rear drums out of round (rear drum brake model)

paragroup.ptxt: Repair or replace drum if necessary.

ps.ptxt: Glazed brake pad and/or brake shoe

action.ptxt: Repair or replace brake pad and/or brake shoe.

ps.ptxt: Worn or distorted brake shoe (rear drum brake model)
Distorted backing plates or loose mounting bolts
Contact of wear indicator to brake disc

condition.ptxt: ABS warning light remains ON (for more than 2 sec) after setting ignition to “ON”

ps.ptxt: Faulty ABS / ESP® control module power supply and ground circuit

action.ptxt: Check ABS / ESP® control module power supply and ground circuit.

condition.ptxt: ABS warning light does not turn ON after setting ignition to “ON”

ps.ptxt: Faulty combination meter power supply and ground circuit

action.ptxt: Check combination meter and its circuit.
Check “MTR” fuse and circuit led to “MTR” fuse: replace if necessary.

condition.ptxt: Brake warning light remains ON (for more than 2 sec) after starting engine

ps.ptxt: ABS / ESP® control module connector is not connected properly

action.ptxt: Connect ABS / ESP® control module connector again.
Release parking brake and check that warning lamp goes off.

ps.ptxt: Faulty parking brake switch and/or brake fluid level switch

item.ptxt: Check brake switch and/or brake fluid level switch.

condition.ptxt: Brake warning light does not turn ON after setting ignition to “ON”

ps.ptxt: Faulty combination meter power supply and ground circuit

action.ptxt: Check combination meter and its circuit.
